title: Terraria
overview: Dig, fight, explore, and build in a vast sandbox world.
description: Terraria is a 2D sandbox adventure game where players explore procedurally generated worlds, gather resources, craft items, and battle a wide variety of enemies and bosses. The game focuses on exploration, building structures, upgrading gear, and uncovering hidden secrets underground and across different biomes.

title: Stardew Valley
overview: Build your dream farm and become part of a lively rural community.
description: Stardew Valley is a farming simulation RPG where players inherit an old farm and transform it into a thriving homestead. You can grow crops, raise animals, mine for resources, fish, craft items, and build relationships with the villagers. The game offers a relaxing open-ended experience with seasonal events, exploration, and cooperative multiplayer.

title: Core Keeper
overview: Explore an underground world filled with secrets, resources, and ancient creatures.
description: Core Keeper is a sandbox survival adventure game where players explore a mysterious underground world. Gather resources, craft equipment, build bases, farm crops, and defeat powerful bosses. The game focuses on cooperative exploration and base building, allowing players to uncover ancient technology and expand their underground civilization.
